summary: iter147 BOTH (backend smoke + frontend MediaFilterEditor). Backend: 9/9 iter146 trusted-device pytests PASS (login/devices/forgot/reset all green after _client_ip refacto into utils/network.py — zero regression). Frontend: 10/10 Playwright assertions PASS — Bob login via computed math captcha, FeedPage composer exposes 3 distinct testids, MediaFilterEditor opens in capture+upload modes, camera headless fallback shown, 10 presets rendered, vintage preset applies CSS sepia+contrast, fine-tune brightness slider live-updates style.filter to brightness(1.4), Apply closes modal and inserts baked thumbnail in composer, Cancel closes cleanly, PwaUpdateBanner absent. The mediaFilters.js helpers were validated indirectly through the live UI (CSS filter strings rendered correctly per preset, mergeAdjustments+IDENTITY visible via 'contrast(0.95) saturate(0.8) sepia(0.35)' on vintage and brightness override merging on slider drag).
critical_code_review_comments: utils/network.py is well-scoped (single responsibility, doc string explains trust order). No duplication remaining — routes/auth.py imports it consistently.

MediaFilterEditor.jsx (419 LOC) — under 700 LOC threshold but creating a new URL.createObjectURL per thumbnail in the multi-file strip render (line 307) without revoking on every re-render risks a small object-URL leak when activeIdx changes. Suggest moving thumbstrip URLs to a useMemo+useEffect cleanup similar to useMemoFileUrl.
mediaFilters.js bakeImageFilter — applySharpen runs O(w*h*9) on the main thread; 2048px cap is a good guardrail but consider OffscreenCanvas+Web Worker for low-end Android in a follow-up.

FILTER_PRESETS = exactly 10 entries as specified. cssFilterString() correctly skips identity components and returns 'none' for empty adj. mergeAdjustments returns IDENTITY for unknown presetId via the optional-chaining fallback. tagVideoWithPreset preserves type/extension and inserts '__filter-{id}' into the filename. All Phase-1 acceptance criteria met.
test_credentials: Bob bob@japap.com / Test1234! used. Math captcha computed live from data-testid='login-page' DOM (regex /(\d+)\s*([+\-x×*])\s*(\d+)/ on text walker). E2E bypass NOT used for frontend.
seed_data_creation: None for frontend. Backend reused the same self-cleaning fixtures as iter147 round 2 (trusted_devices reset between test classes). One temp file /tmp/test_filter.jpg (320x240 JPEG, PIL) generated for set_input_files.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter147 Phase 1 media filters fully validated. Backend regression run: `cd /app/backend && PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python3 -m pytest tests/test_iter146_auth_trusted.py -v` (~68s, 9/9). Frontend e2e: Playwright script in this iteration used computed math-captcha login (bob), set_input_files on file-upload-input, then asserted modal/preset/slider/apply flow. data-testids confirmed to be stable: media-filter-editor, media-filter-cancel, media-filter-apply, media-filter-preview, media-filter-preset-{none|mono|sepia|vivid|warm|cool|vintage|dramatic|soft|sharp}, media-filter-fine-{brightness|contrast|saturate}, media-filter-camera-error. Phase 2 (IA filters via Gemini Nano Banana / fal.ai) is the next unlocked iteration per source-code TODOs in mediaFilters.js header.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
